title: Query Builder
description: A component that provides a visual interface for building structured filters using groups and rules, emitting normalized JSON query data.

types.title: AXQueryBuilderComponent
types.description: The main component for building queries.

props.name: columnData
props.description: Available columns: array of { field, label, type, values? }.

props.name: queryData
props.description: Two-way model of rules/groups with ids, condition, field, operator, value.

methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the condition (AND/OR) of a target query group.
 *
 * @param e - Selected condition item.
 * @param i - Target group/rule item.
 * @returns void
 */
conditionHandler(e: AXButtonGroupItemComponent, i: any): void

/**
 * Updates a rule when a column is selected.
 *
 * @param e - Column selection change event.
 * @param i - Target rule item.
 * @returns void
 */
columnDataHandler(e: AXValueChangedEvent<any>, i: any): void

/**
 * Updates the selected operator for a rule.
 *
 * @param e - Operator selection event.
 * @param i - Target rule item.
 * @returns void
 */
operatorDataHandler(e: any, i: any): void

/**
 * Adds a new rule to the target group.
 *
 * @param i - Target group item.
 * @returns void
 */
addRulesHandler(i: any): void

/**
 * Adds a nested group with a default rule to the target group.
 *
 * @param i - Target group item.
 * @returns void
 */
addGroupHandler(i: any): void

/**
 * Removes a group from query data by id.
 *
 * @param i - Target group item.
 * @returns void
 */
removeGroupHandler(i: any): void

/**
 * Removes a rule from query data by id.
 *
 * @param i - Target rule item.
 * @returns void
 */
removeRulesHandler(i: any): void

/**
 * TrackBy function used for rendering rule/group lists.
 *
 * @param _ - Item index.
 * @param item - Current rule/group item.
 * @returns number - Stable item id.
 */
trackById(_: number, item: any): number
